_note: Labeled precision fixture for src/utils/deviceDetection.js. Positives must flag every device in `expected` (extra in-scope labels allowed). Negatives/traps must produce ZERO device labels. No line should ever surface assonance/consonance/metaphor/allegory (quiz-only, structurally impossible from the detector).

lines.line: Peter Piper picked a peck of pickled peppers.
The clock went tick tock through the night.
Never, never, never give up on your dreams.
She sells seashells by the seashore.
The bees buzz and the snakes hiss loudly.
As brave as a lion, he faced the storm.
He runs like the wind across the field.
Round and round the ragged rock the rascal ran.
The cat sat on the mat in the flat.
I like coffee every single morning.
lines.trap: simile ("like" as a verb, not a comparison marker)

lines.line: The ordinary meeting ended on time.
She walked quietly across the room.
lines.trap: plain sentence, no shared sounds or repeats

lines.line: A calm plain statement of simple fact.
lines.trap: non-adjacent same-letter words must not count as alliteration

lines.line: Birds fly south before the cold arrives.
Our team finished the project ahead of schedule.
